report.summary: Day 70 cycle v2: 2 new learn guides built this cycle (solana-defi-ecosystem, tee-verifiable-compute) with PROPER server component patterns. Mar 23 earlier pages (smart-contract-security, onchain-identity) still have client-component metadata bug unfixed. Git locks persist 7 days — 0 commits, 0 deploys. 635 uncommitted files. PUBLISH_QUEUE emptied to PUBLISHED_PAGES (420 slugs), but 103 orphan slugs still have no page.tsx.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: NEW THIS CYCLE: 2 learn guides built — /learn/solana-defi-ecosystem-guide-2026 + /learn/tee-verifiable-compute-guide. Both use CORRECT server component pattern with metadata export, StructuredData (JSON-LD), Breadcrumb, and BackToTop components.

STILL BROKEN: /learn/smart-contract-security-guide + /learn/onchain-identity-guide (from earlier Mar 23 cycle) — missing StructuredData, Breadcrumb, BackToTop components. However, NO 'use client' directive found — metadata exports should work. Components just missing.
PUBLISH_QUEUE is now empty — all pages promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES. 420 total slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES.
ORPHAN AUDIT: 103 slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES still have no matching page.tsx — unchanged from last cycle. These will 404.
BUILD CONFIG: ignoreBuildErrors:true still active in next.config.ts — masks TypeScript errors at build time.
NO REGRESSIONS on existing published pages — structure unchanged.

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: API ROUTE FILES: All 6 core routes present — /api/prices, /api/trending, /api/fear-greed, /api/market-metrics, /api/market-dominance, /api/defi-yields.
CACHE HEADERS: All 6 routes have Cache-Control with stale-while-revalidate configured. TTLs appropriate per data freshness needs.
FALLBACK DATA: 5/6 routes have fallback handling. /api/defi-yields returns 500 on upstream failure — NO fallback. Carry-over P1 (flagged 36+ cycles).
RATE LIMITING: 0/6 core API routes have rate limiters. Library exists but not wired. Carry-over P1 (flagged 36+ cycles).
X-CACHE-SOURCE HEADER: Only 2/6 routes include it (prices, market-dominance). 4 missing. Carry-over P2.
NO API ROUTE CHANGES this cycle — all findings unchanged from last report.

sections.title: DevOps
items: DEPLOYMENT BLOCKED: Git locks (.git/HEAD.lock + .git/index.lock) persist since Mar 16 — now 7 days. Cannot commit or push.
LAST COMMIT: e999560 on Mar 17 — 'promote 2 pages to production (Day 62)'. Production running this build.
WORKING TREE DRIFT: 635 uncommitted files (tracked modifications + untracked new pages). Local/production drift continues to grow.
BUILD CONFIG: standalone output, NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=8192', ignoreBuildErrors:true. No vercel.json.
LINT: next lint misconfigured — reports 'Invalid project directory'. Non-blocking but should be fixed.
ACTION NEEDED: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → staged commits → push to trigger Vercel deploy.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: 2 learn guides built (solana-defi-ecosystem + tee-verifiable-compute) with proper architecture. Both publish-ready.
NOT SHIPPED: 0 commits, 0 deploys, 0 pages promoted to production. All work sits in uncommitted working tree.
DELTA FROM LAST REPORT: 2 new pages added. PUBLISH_QUEUE emptied (was 4 pages, now 0). smart-contract-security + onchain-identity still missing StructuredData/Breadcrumb/BackToTop.
BLOCKER [P0]: Git locks — 7 days and counting. Single point of failure for entire deploy pipeline. Resolution: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock.
BLOCKER [P1]: 2 of 4 recently built pages (smart-contract-security, onchain-identity) missing SEO infrastructure components — need programmer fix.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: /api/defi-yields missing fallback data (flagged 36+ cycles).
CARRY-OVER [P1]: Rate limiter not wired on any of 6 API routes (flagged 36+ cycles).
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 103 orphan slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES with no page.tsx.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: next lint misconfigured.
NEXT CYCLE PRIORITY: Clear git locks → fix missing components on 2 pages → staged commit → deploy.
